mainStack.name: Grant
mainStack.bio: The team's IGL and best gun. Grant leads with reads, wins the isolated duels nobody else takes, and holds composure when the round is on the line.

mainStack.name: Peej
mainStack.bio: A career entry fragger with over 1,200 rounds on Ash — the stack's primary point of attack. Equally reliable on defense, where Maestro and Caveira give him a genuine anchor identity.

mainStack.name: Hound
mainStack.bio: The backbone of the stack's coordinated pushes. Hound wins rounds through utility, callouts, and enabling the team's fraggers — one of the most consistently active players on the roster.

mainStack.name: Smigs
mainStack.bio: The most reliable support player on the roster. Smigs brings a team-first mentality to every round — utility clearing, hard breach, and group entry without needing the frag lead.

mainStack.name: Sarge
mainStack.bio: A two-way player whose real identity lives on defense. Vigil is his career anchor, and on attack he's most effective leading the three-man group rather than working solo.

bTeam.name: Slug
bTeam.bio: An adaptable solo queue veteran who thrives in isolated duels and 1v1 situations. One of the most active players by match count — comfortable running whatever role the team needs.

bTeam.name: Krafty
bTeam.bio: A developing player with strong mechanical aim and an upward rank trajectory. Lesion DEF anchor is his established identity, with ATK still taking shape.

bTeam.name: Bob
bTeam.bio: A consistent DEF anchor with a career-long trap identity built around Kapkan. Solid K/D and multiple operator reinventions across his career history.

bTeam.name: Hunter
bTeam.bio: One of the deepest DEF pools in the group — Aruni, Caveira, Valkyrie, and Thorn all above 56% WR with substantial rounds. A reliable hard-anchor identity when active.

bTeam.name: Cheese
bTeam.bio: Exceptional DEF pool — Thorn (748r, 60.4%), Vigil (602r, 57.6%), Kapkan (473r, 59.4%), Pulse (463r, 59.0%), Castle (384r, 57.0%). Five primary DEF ops above 55% WR with 280+ rounds each. Multiple additional DEF ops (Fenrir 64.7%, Maestro 63.8%, Frost 66.4%, Kaid 64.3%, Wamai 64.0%) at strong WR with 60+ rounds. Arguably the deepest DEF pool in the B Team group.

other.name: D-Man
other.role: Hard-anchor DEF specialist. Mira (11r, 72.7% WR, 1.14 K/D) is a standout small-sample stat — could develop into a primary Mira main. Fenrir (6r, 1.50 K/D) also noteworthy.
other.bio: DEF anchor with strong hard-denial pool. Bandit (67.4% WR), Frost (65.1%), Azami (63.0%), Castle (61.2%), Kaid (55.4%), Kapkan (57.9%) — multiple DEF ops above 55% WR with 30+ rounds. Consistent hard-anchor identity.

other.name: Tyrone
other.role: DEF anchor / support. Rook opener is ideal — sets up the team. Mute, Mozzie, Kapkan all show solid career WRs. Not a roamer; likely plays close and holds.
other.bio: DEF anchor. Rook (1,106r, 62.0% WR) is the dominant career identity — reliable anchor with consistent win rates across Mute, Mozzie, Kapkan, Kaid. DEF side is where TazRathmus earns rounds.
